_comment: Broker commission per side, by micro/standard tier. `comm` is the CURRENT rate (snapshot mid-2026); optional `rateHistory` (F30) holds prior periods as { until: last day inclusive, comm, source } oldest-first — brokers rarely change commissions and never archive them, so entries exist only where a change is citable. Edit values here, then run scripts/build-manifest.mjs to refresh the cache-busting hash.

DISCOUNTTRADING.name: Discount Trading
DISCOUNTTRADING._source: discounttrading.com/commission-rates.html (fetched 2026-07-04): base tier $0.20/side micro, $0.49/side standard; exchange/clearing/NFA additional; volume tiers go lower (F35)
